summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 2 features for The Blues Hotel Collective website. All new backend APIs (11/11) working perfectly. Admin dashboard with Recharts visualization, account management, activity log, pages editor, episode engagement, and static page routing all functional. One minor UI timing issue with comment form expansion during automation.

ui_bugs.issue: Comment form fields not expanding properly during automated testing after clicking comments toggle
ui_bugs.note: Backend API works perfectly, likely timing issue in UI automation

passed_tests: All Phase 2 backend APIs: change-password, change-email, change-name (account management)
Admin dashboard with Recharts charts: Episodes by Show (bar chart), Subscriber Growth (line chart)
Admin activity log page shows 16+ entries with timestamps, actions, IP addresses
Admin pages editor lists privacy-policy and terms-of-use with edit functionality
Episode engagement APIs: like/unlike, post comments, get engagement data
Static page routing: /privacy-policy and /terms-of-use load with correct content
Social sharing buttons present on episodes (Facebook, X/Twitter, Copy Link)
Admin sidebar navigation includes Pages and Activity Log items
Account management UI forms present with proper data-testid attributes
All Phase 1 features still working (confirmed from previous iteration)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (33/33 API endpoints including 11 new Phase 2 APIs)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (minor UI timing issue with comment form expansion)
success_percentage.admin: 100% (dashboard charts, settings, activity log, pages all working)
